codeReview.summary: The mobile-contracts package cleanly introduces the required DTOs, session event unions, request/auth types, and includes basic export/event list tests. The contract shapes align with existing desktop/shared types and the expected MVP event set.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The gateway-worker skill mandates a strict test-first (RED) workflow for all features, but the contract-only feature was implemented and tested in a single pass. Consider documenting an exception for contract scaffolding where export/type definitions and tests are authored together.
